## 2025-04-14 - Fix Timing Attack in User Authentication
**Vulnerability:** Timing attack allowing user enumeration. The login endpoint took significantly less time to reject non-existent users compared to existing users with incorrect passwords.
**Learning:** `argon2-cffi`'s `verify` function rejects invalidly formatted dummy hashes instantly, defeating the purpose of a dummy verification. The dummy hash must be a structurally valid Argon2id hash string (e.g., `$argon2id$v=19$...`).
**Prevention:** When mitigating timing attacks using dummy hashes, ensure the dummy hash is generated by the same algorithm with the same parameters as the actual hashes, so the verification time matches.
